## What changed

Explain the change in business terms first, then mention the technical implementation.

## Why it matters

Describe the user, reporting, or operational impact.

## Risks

Call out semantic drift, metric changes, dashboard regressions, or rollout concerns.

## Validation

List the commands, screenshots, result checks, or reasoning you used to validate the change.

## Changelog note

Write a concise public-facing note, or write `skip` if the change is fully internal.
